reviews.review_title: Wouldn’t even let me out of the lobby
reviews.review_description: It wouldn’t let me out of the lobby and wouldn’t let me join a room

this game is very specific you can’t go out of the lobby sadly but there were some very nice boxes around the map there were some pipes and a wardrobe for you to change your skin and your cosmetics in also the atmosphere was very scary 10 out of 10 game ￼
